title: Verify user can log out from all active sessions
description: Tests the 'Logout from all devices' functionality, which should invalidate all active sessions and refresh tokens for the user.
preconditions: User is logged in on two different browsers (Session A and Session B).
User is viewing their account settings page in Session A.

steps.description: 1. In Session A, navigate to the 'Active Sessions' or 'Security' page.
2. Click the 'Logout from all devices' button and confirm.
3. Verify that Session A is logged out and redirected to the login page.
4. In Session B, attempt to refresh the page or navigate to a protected area.

expected_result: The action in Session A is successful. In Session B, the user is automatically logged out and redirected to the login page upon their next action. Any attempt to use an old refresh token from either session fails.
